questionHtml:
Determine the change in the average oxidation state of carbon. 

From ethanol to ethanal:

From ethanol to carbon dioxide:
markschemeHtml:
From ethanol to ethanal:
−2 to −1
OR
+1/increases by 1 ✔

NOTE: Do not accept “2− to 1−”.

From ethanol to carbon dioxide:
−2 to +4
OR
+6/increases by 6 ✔

NOTE: Do not accept “2− to 4+”.

Do not penalize incorrect notation twice.

Penalize incorrect oxidation state value of carbon in ethanol once only.

meta.title: Determine the change in the average oxidation state of carbon. From ethanol to ethanal: From ethanol to carbon dioxide:
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.3.1—Reactive metals, non-metals and organic compounds undergo combustion reactions when heated in oxygen. Deduce equations for reactions of combustion, including hydrocarbons and alcohols.
